/usr/bin/c++ -ffunction-sections -Wall  -maes -msse2 -msse4.1 -mpclmul -Wfatal-errors -fPIC -Wno-ignored-attributes -std=c++14 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_gc_aes.dir/test_gc_aes.cpp.o -o test_gc_aes  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/andreasathanas/Desktop/GitHub/fuzzy_pets/disco/mobile_psi_cpp/build/droidCrypto -Wl,-rpath,/Users/andreasathanas/Desktop/GitHub/fuzzy_pets/disco/mobile_psi_cpp/build/droidCrypto/keccak ../libdroidcrypto.dylib -lpthread ../ot/SimplestOT/ref10/libSimplestOT.a ../relic/lib/librelic_s.a -lrt -lpthread -lm ../lowmc/liblowmc.a ../psi/cuckoofilter/libcuckoo.a ../keccak/libkeccak.dylib
